title: Service Outcomes, Boundaries, and Server Lifecycle · Execution Trace: Process Listener Handler State
summary: A civic incident API has endpoints but no stated user outcome, ownership boundary, startup contract, dependency readiness, shutdown policy, or evidence connecting a request to durable effect. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo process listener handler state increment in service outcome, boundary, and lifecycle map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish process, listener, connection, stream, request, handler, goroutine, dependency, and durable-state lifetimes.
Trace user agent, client, proxy, gateway, origin handler, dependency, and response roles without assigning one component evidence it cannot observe.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
